pluginDescription: Adjust candidate scores based on whether a station has already been worked.
biasOverviewDesc: This plugin does not filter targets. It boosts new stations and penalizes already-worked callsigns.
newStationBonusDesc: Extra score added for callsigns that have not been worked yet.
workedStationPenaltyDesc: Score deducted for callsigns that already exist in the logbook.
